topics.heading: Introduce your self
points: Good morning/afternoon. My name is Girish Shimpi.

I have around 2.6 years of experience as a Java Full Stack Developer and currently work at Jio Platforms Limited. I started my career as a backend developer and gradually expanded my role into full-stack development.
My primary technical skills include Core Java, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA, Microservices, Oracle SQL, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Git, and RESTful web services.

In my current role, I am responsible for developing new features, building and maintaining backend services, designing REST APIs, writing optimized SQL queries, fixing production issues, participating in code reviews, and developing frontend modules using React and Next.js. I also write unit tests and work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software.
Working in the fintech domain has given me experience in building scalable and reliable applications while focusing on performance, maintainability, and clean code practices.

I am now looking for an opportunity where I can work on challenging enterprise applications, enhance my technical skills, and contribute to the organization's growth while continuing to grow as a Full Stack Java Developer.

topics.heading: JOP Ticketing System (AI-Augmented Support Platform)
points: One of my recent projects is the JOP Ticketing System, an AI-powered support platform designed to automate ticket resolution. The system processes support requests received through emails, analyzes logs and knowledge base documents using AI agents, and generates contextual responses to help support teams resolve issues faster.

The application was built using LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, OpenAI, Qdrant, React, and WebSockets. My responsibilities included developing backend APIs, integrating AI workflows, implementing real-time communication, and building frontend components for ticket management and monitoring.

topics.heading: QEssence (AI-Powered Test Automation Platform)
points: QEssence is an AI-powered test automation platform that enables users to create and execute automated test cases with minimal manual effort. It provides a drag-and-drop workflow builder, AI-generated Playwright test scripts, browser extensions for recording user actions, and supports multi-tenant execution.

The application was built using React, ReactFlow, NestJS, Playwright, Bull Queue, JWT, and RBAC. My responsibilities included developing backend APIs, implementing workflow execution logic, integrating authentication and authorization, and contributing to frontend features for test design and execution.
